channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【A one-line Kubernetes fix that saved 600 hours a year】一条 Kubernetes 修复方案一年节省了 600 个小时
item.description: 【 When we investigated why our Atlantis instance took 30 minutes to restart, we discovered a bottleneck in how Kubernetes handles volume permissions. By adjusting the fsGroupChangePolicy, we reduced restart times to 30 seconds. 】当我们调查为什么 Atlantis 实例需要 30 分钟才能重新启动时，我们发现 Kubernetes 处理卷权限的方式存在瓶颈。通过调整 fsGroupChangePolicy，我们将重启时间减少到 30 秒。

item.title: 【Sandboxing AI agents, 100x faster】沙盒 AI 代理，速度提高 100 倍
item.description: 【 We’re introducing Dynamic Workers, which allow you to execute AI-generated code in secure, lightweight isolates. This approach is 100 times faster than traditional containers, enabling millisecond startup times for AI agent sandboxing. 】我们正在引入动态工作人员，它允许您在安全、轻量级的隔离中执行人工智能生成的代码。这种方法比传统容器快 100 倍，使 AI 代理沙箱的启动时间达到毫秒级。

item.title: 【Launching Cloudflare’s Gen 13 servers: trading cache for cores for 2x edge compute performance】推出 Cloudflare 第 13 代服务器：用缓存换取核心以获得 2 倍边缘计算性能
item.description: 【 Cloudflare’s Gen 13 servers double our compute throughput by rethinking the balance between cache and cores. Moving to high-core-count AMD EPYC ™ Turin CPUs, we traded large L3 cache for raw compute density. By running our new Rust-based FL2 stack, we completely mitigated the latency penalty to unlock twice the performance. 】Cloudflare 的第 13 代服务器通过重新考虑缓存和核心之间的平衡，使我们的计算吞吐量翻倍。转向高核心数 AMD EPYC™ Turin CPU，我们用大型 L3 缓存换取原始计算密度。通过运行我们新的基于 Rust 的 FL2 堆栈，我们完全减轻了延迟损失，从而实现了两倍的性能。

item.title: 【Inside Gen 13: how we built our most powerful server yet】Gen 13 内部：我们如何构建迄今为止最强大的服务器
item.description: 【 Cloudflare's Gen 13 servers introduce AMD EPYC™ Turin 9965 processors and a transition to 100 GbE networking to meet growing traffic demands. In this technical deep dive, we explain the engineering rationale behind each major component selection. 】Cloudflare 的第 13 代服务器引入了 AMD EPYC™ Turin 9965 处理器并过渡到 100 GbE 网络，以满足不断增长的流量需求。在本次技术深入探讨中，我们解释了每个主要组件选择背后的工程原理。

item.title: 【Powering the agents: Workers AI now runs large models, starting with Kimi K2.5】为代理提供动力：Workers AI 现在运行大型模型，从 Kimi K2.5 开始
item.description: 【 Kimi K2.5 is now on Workers AI, helping you power agents entirely on Cloudflare’s Developer Platform. Learn how we optimized our inference stack and reduced inference costs for internal agent use cases. 】Kimi K2.5 现已加入 Workers AI，帮助您完全在 Cloudflare 的开发者平台上为代理提供支持。了解我们如何优化推理堆栈并降低内部代理用例的推理成本。

item.title: 【Introducing Custom Regions for precision data control】引入自定义区域以实现精确数据控制
item.description: 【 We are expanding Regional Services with new pre-defined regions and the launch of Custom Regions. Customers can now define precise geographical boundaries for data processing, tailored to meet their compliance and performance needs. 】我们正在通过新的预定义区域和自定义区域的推出来扩展区域服务。客户现在可以定义精确的数据处理地理边界，以满足其合规性和性能需求。

item.title: 【Standing up for the open Internet: why we appealed Italy’s "Piracy Shield" fine】捍卫开放互联网：我们为何对意大利的“盗版盾”罚款提出上诉
item.description: 【 Cloudflare is appealing a €14 million fine from Italian regulators over "Piracy Shield," a system that forces providers to block content without oversight. We are challenging this framework to protect the Internet from disproportionate overblocking and lack of due process. 】Cloudflare 对意大利监管机构就“盗版盾”罚款 1400 万欧元提出上诉，该系统迫使提供商在没有监督的情况下屏蔽内容。我们正在挑战这一框架，以保护互联网免受不成比例的过度封锁和缺乏正当程序的影响。

item.title: 【From legacy architecture to Cloudflare One】从遗留架构到 Cloudflare One
item.description: 【 Learn how Cloudflare and CDW de-risk SASE migrations with a blueprint that treats legacy debt as an application modernization project. 】了解 Cloudflare 和 CDW 如何通过将遗留债务视为应用程序现代化项目的蓝图来降低 SASE 迁移风险。

item.title: 【Announcing Cloudflare Account Abuse Protection: prevent fraudulent attacks from bots and humans】宣布推出 Cloudflare 帐户滥用保护：防止来自机器人和人类的欺诈性攻击
item.description: 【 Blocking bots isn’t enough anymore. Cloudflare’s new fraud prevention capabilities — now available in Early Access — help stop account abuse before it starts. 】阻止机器人已经不够了。 Cloudflare 的新欺诈预防功能（现已提供抢先体验）有助于在帐户滥用发生之前阻止其发生。

item.title: 【Slashing agent token costs by 98% with RFC 9457-compliant error responses】通过符合 RFC 9457 的错误响应，将代理令牌成本削减 98%
item.description: 【 Cloudflare now returns RFC 9457-compliant structured Markdown and JSON error payloads to AI agents, replacing heavyweight HTML pages with machine-readable instructions. This reduces token usage by over 98%, turning brittle parsing into efficient control flow. 】Cloudflare 现在将符合 RFC 9457 的结构化 Markdown 和 JSON 错误负载返回给 AI 代理，用机器可读指令替换重量级 HTML 页面。这减少了超过 98% 的令牌使用量，将脆弱的解析转变为高效的控制流。
